summary: Here are some ideas that may be gaining ground inside the prime minister-in-waiting’s brain trust.

title: Magnolia Oil & Gas Is in Lead to Acquire WildFire for Over $4 Billion
title_cn: 厚朴油和Gas有望以超过40亿美元收购WildFire
summary: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp. has emerged as the front-runner to acquire closely held WildFire Energy for more than $4 billion in what would rank as its largest-ever acquisition, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Dow Jones Finishes Day Down; Week Up | Closing Bell
title_cn: 道琼斯收盘下跌；一周 |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Coffee Company Kahawa 1893 Works to Empower Women Farmers
title_cn: 咖啡公司 Kahawa 1893 致力于为女性农民赋权
summary: Margaret Nyambumo, founder of coffee company Kahawa 1893 and third-generation coffee farmer, said that she created the option to directly tip the female farmers who grow her coffee beans because she wanted to find a way to consistently and fairly compensate them regardless of fluctuation in coffee prices. Nyambumo said that the tips from customers — which are matched by the company — have been used by one of the farming collectives to start a scholarship for young girls to stay in school.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Education 'Getting Act Together' on Personal Finance: Cohen
title_cn: 个人理财教育“共同行动”：科恩
summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss personal finance and the US education system's effort to educate students on financial literacy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alternative Soda Brands Taking Over Beverage Markets
title_cn: 替代汽水品牌占领饮料市场
summary: Poppi Co-Founder Allison Ellsworth describes struggles of breaking into beverage industry, warns getting product on shelves is "capital intensive." Ellsworth says movement within "MAHA" is changing industry standards, including for beverage giants like Pepsi which purchased Poppi in 2025 for nearly $2 Billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Abby Joseph Cohen Talks Greenspan's Legacy
title_cn: 艾比·约瑟夫·科恩谈论格林斯潘的遗产
summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss the legacy of former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan who died this week at the age of 100. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Look Ahead: US Jobs Report, America 250
title_cn: 展望未来：美国就业报告，美国 250 强
summary: Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene discuss the week ahead for the markets and your money on this weeks edition of "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carl Richards on the Power of Compounding
title_cn: 卡尔·理查兹论复利的力量
summary: Barry sits down with Carl Richards author of "Your Money: Reimagining Wealth in Simple Sketches ." They discuss Carl's unlikely start in finance and building his own firm. Carl also breaks down how one sketch helped him translate wealth management and become a New York Times columnist.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Climbs Above $4,000 as Inflation Print Curbs Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 通胀打印抑制加息押注 金价攀升至 4,000 美元以上
summary: Gold extended gains above $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest price since November.

title: キオクシア米上場計画、高市政権「370兆円投資」、投資のプロ4人が明かす1000万円投資術──1週間のニュース5選
title_cn: 铠侠美国上市计划、高市政府“370万亿日元投资”、四位投资专业人士透露的1000万日元投资技巧——本周5则新闻报道
summary: マーケットで話題になったニュースから、1週間を振り返る五つのトピックを厳選して紹介します。

title: Must-Read Books About Alan Greenspan's Legacy
title_cn: 关于艾伦·格林斯潘遗产的必读书籍
summary:
Tom Keene and Lisa Mateo discuses the must-read books about Alan Greenspan's legacy on this weeks edition of "Bloomberg Money." Former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan died this week at the age of 100.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Oil Plunges Below $70 as Ships Keep Crossing Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 由于船只不断穿越霍尔木兹海峡，美国石油价格跌破 70 美元
summary: US oil plunged, erasing nearly all its gains made during the war, as vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz continued to rise and as investors increasingly expect the market to be oversupplied with Persian Gulf exports rebounding sharply.

title: EM Stocks Post Worst Week in More Than Three Months on AI Rout
title_cn: 新兴市场股票因人工智能溃败而录得三个多月以来最糟糕的一周
summary: Emerging-market stocks posted their biggest weekly decline since early March, weighed down by a renewed selloff in technology shares that hammered South Korean equities.

title: Stocks Waver as Wall Street Rotation Gains Speed: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着华尔街旋转速度加快，股市波动：市场结束
summary: Wall Street traders kept driving a rotation out of high-profile chipmakers and into a broader category of companies tuned to improving growth prospects, with stocks wavering at the end of a volatile week.

title: AI Rout Exposes Wall Street’s $270 Billion Speculation Machine
title_cn: AI 溃败暴露了华尔街 2700 亿美元的投机机器
summary: This week’s tech rout did more than puncture one of the year’s hottest trades: it exposed the machinery of modern speculation — and how quickly it can work in reverse.

title: US Chipmaker Selloff Pushes Key Stock Indexes to Weekly Loss
title_cn: 美国芯片制造商抛售导致主要股指每周下跌
summary: US stocks ended the week lower as ongoing weakness in chip stocks outweighed a survey showing cooler-than-expected inflation expectations and easing rate hike concerns.

title: Bloomberg Money 6/26/2026
title_cn: 彭博财经 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Today's guests are: Columbia Business School Professor Abby Joseph Cohen and Morgan Stanley Wealth Management Managing Director Daniel Skelly. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hubble Pushes Satellite Network For Long-Range Bluetooth
title_cn: 哈勃推动卫星网络实现远程蓝牙
summary: Alex Haro Co-Founder & CEO at Hubble Network joins Bloomberg Businessweek to the future of Bluetooth and the space economy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Embraces the Dollar as Warsh’s Fed Activates Bulls
title_cn: 随着沃什的美联储激活多头，华尔街拥抱美元
summary: Only a year ago, Wall Street banks couldn’t come up with enough reasons to sell the dollar. Whether it was de-dollarization, “hedge America” or the debasement trade, the dollar was doomed.

title: Stock Valuations Should Worry Investors: Abby Joseph Cohen
title_cn: 股票估值应该让投资者担心：艾比·约瑟夫·科恩
summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." Lofty stock prices may be hiding risks investors should be paying more attention to, especially in the labor market, according to Abby Joseph Cohen, the former Goldman Sachs partner and now Columbia Business School professor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TPG, Leonard Green Explore Sale of McIlroy-Backed Troon Golf
title_cn: TPG 和伦纳德·格林 (Leonard Green) 探讨出售麦克罗伊支持的特伦高尔夫 (Troon Golf)
summary: The private equity owners of Troon Golf are exploring a potential sale of the company, which is one of the largest US golf course operators, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: CFTC Conducting Broad Probe Into Prediction Market Polymarket
title_cn: CFTC 对预测市场进行广泛调查 Polymarket
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission is conducting an extensive investigation into Polymarket, according to a person familiar with the matter, the latest challenge for the prediction market platform plagued by operational stumbles and legal scrutiny.

title: Money Roundtable: Hidden Inflation, Social Security
title_cn: 货币圆桌会议：隐性通胀、社会保障
summary:
Bloomberg's David Gura and Romaine Bostick join Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss this week's US inflation report, Apple's price hike, and the future of social security.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Drops on Cooler Outlooks as July Contract Expires
title_cn: 7 月合同到期，美国天然气价格因前景降温而下跌
summary: US natural gas futures settled much lower in the final day of trading for the July contract as midday forecasts shifted to show cooler weather compared with overnight outlooks. Individual transactions moved the market more amid a drop-off in liquidity near expiry.

title: South Korean Regulators Are Lamenting Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: 韩国监管机构对杠杆ETF感到遗憾
summary: Frenzied trading in South Korea has renewed concerns about the leveraged ETF boom

title: John Bolton Pleads Guilty to Mishandling Classified Material
title_cn: 约翰·博尔顿承认不当处理机密材料
summary: John Bolton, a former national security adviser to President Donald Trump who became one of his fiercest critics, appeared in court on Friday to plead guilty to unlawfully retaining national defense information.  Robert McWhirter, Constitutional lawyer and a practicing criminal defense and civil rights lawyer in Maricopa County, AZ  and Founder of the Law Office of Robert McWhirter, joined to discuss the case as well as the recent decisions from the Supreme Court.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela Quake Crisis Tests Legitimacy of Rodriguez Regime
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震危机考验罗德里格斯政权的合法性
summary: The earthquakes that struck Venezuela Wednesday have become the first major political test for acting President Delcy Rodríguez, with the disaster quickly evolving into a contest over competence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Exxon’s Top US Gas Trader to Join Expand as Exits Hit Oil Giant
title_cn: 石油巨头退出后，埃克森美孚美国顶级天然气交易商将加入扩张
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp.’s head of US gas and power trading is moving to Expand Energy Corp., one of several recent departures from a unit the supermajor has been trying to grow.

title: Trump Says Iran Violated Ceasefire With Hormuz Drone Attack
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗霍尔木兹无人机袭击违反停火协议
summary: US President Donald Trump accused Iran of violating their ceasefire agreement by firing at cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz, underscoring how unsettled the situation remains in a waterway critical to global energy flows. Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery (Ret.), former-Destroyer Squadron Commander in the United States Navy and Senior Fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies joined Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Epic Fury Has Been an 'Epic Failure' Says Rep. Dean
title_cn: 众议员迪恩表示，史诗般的愤怒是一场“史诗般的失败”
summary: Congresswoman Madeleine Dean, a Pennsylvania Democrat and member of House committees on foreign affairs and appropriations joined Balance of Power to discuss the Iran war diplomacy and the administration’s budget requests. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Limits Release of New Model Under Pressure From US
title_cn: OpenAI 迫于美国压力限制新模型发布
summary: OpenAI is rolling out a preview version of a more capable new artificial intelligence model to select partners before making it available more widely in the coming weeks, following pressure from the Trump administration to stagger the release.

title: Unremarkable Economy, Remarkable Rally: Skelly
title_cn: 经济平淡，反弹引人注目：斯凯利
summary: Dan Skelly, managing director and head of the equity model portfolio team at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Stocks Plunge as AI Selloff Ripples Across From Asia
title_cn: 人工智能抛售席卷亚洲，美国芯片股暴跌
summary: A global selloff in the shares of chipmakers dragged US indexes sharply lower amid doubts about the sustainability of the AI-fueled tech rally. Katherine Kostereva, CEO, Creatio joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gen-Z Traders Go for Broke In American Dream Pursuit
title_cn: Z世代交易者在追求美国梦的过程中陷入破碎
summary: Bloomberg's Justina Lee joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." The share of stock volumes of retail investors has doubled over the past 15 years, Bloomberg Intelligence estimates. Social media and the gamification of trading have played a decisive role in the growth of investing in crypto, options, sports betting, and prediction markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Trade’s Bruising Week Forces Investors to Be More Selective
title_cn: AI Trade 的惨痛一周迫使投资者更加挑剔
summary: Adam Dell, founder and CEO at Domain Money joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the intersection of fintech, VC, and early stage startup mechanics and building a tech business.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: An Analyst’s Missed Remark Surfaced in Deadly Iran School Strike Probe
title_cn: 伊朗学校罢工事件调查中，一名分析师遗漏的言论浮出水面
summary: An intelligence analyst’s missed remarks are among the missteps surfaced in an investigation into a deadly strike against an elementary school in Iran.

title: Apple’s Vision Pro and Smart Glasses Chief to Join OpenAI
title_cn: 苹果 Vision Pro 和智能眼镜主管将加入 OpenAI
summary: Apple Inc.’s top executive in charge of the Vision Pro headset and the company’s smart glasses efforts is leaving for OpenAI, continuing a streak of high-profile defections to rivals in the artificial intelligence and hardware sectors.

title: Beyond Chips, IMF Sees AI Wealth Boom Adding to Inflation Risks
title_cn: 除了芯片之外，国际货币基金组织还认为人工智能财富繁荣会增加通胀风险
summary: Artificial intelligence may fuel inflation not just by driving up the cost of chips, but also by making consumers wealthier and more willing to spend, according to the International Monetary Fund’s chief economist.

title: Trump Vows 100% Tariff on Europe Over Digital Services Taxes
title_cn: 特朗普誓言对欧洲征收 100% 数字服务税
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to impose 100% tariffs on goods imported from countries that impose digital services taxes, escalating pressure on European nations that just ratified a trade pact with the US.

title: Consumer is Feeling 'A Lot of Pressure' But Bed Bath & Beyond Sees Upside
title_cn: 消费者感到“很大的压力”，但 Bed Bath & Beyond 看到了好处
summary: Amy Sullivan, CEO of Bed Bath & Beyond, said that consumers are feeling 'a lot of pressure' but that company's outlook is that if they can do business at a low point there is a high upside to come. Sullivan also talked about Bed Bath & Beyond's efforts to engage with consumers, including a new sweepstakes around the company's iconic coupons.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Tightens US Driver Background Checks as Sexual Assault Cases Mount
title_cn: 随着性侵犯案件的增加，优步加强了美国司机的背景调查
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is tightening driver background checks in the US and applying the new standards retroactively to existing workers, the company’s latest response to a wave of sexual-assault lawsuits brought by passengers.

title: iPhone Price Hikes Will Come, Says IDC
title_cn: IDC 表示 iPhone 价格将会上涨
summary: Apple announced price hikes across its hardware products, citing unprecedented price gains in memory chips. Missing from that price hike list, for now, is the iPhone. Nabila Popal, Senior Research Director at IDC, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is AI Distillation and Why Is It a Worry for the Industry?
title_cn: 什么是AI蒸馏？为什么它会引起业界的担忧？
summary: Artificial intelligence companies in the US have spent hundreds of billions of dollars to develop more advanced chatbots, betting they can earn enough from customers to justify the investment. That approach carries the risk of being undermined by rivals who build competing AI systems for far less.

title: OpenAI Weighs IPO in 2027 | Bloomberg Tech 6/26/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 考虑在 2027 年进行 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down OpenAI's decision to potentially hold off on an IPO until next year - sending shares of SoftBank falling. Plus, global tech stocks drop after Apple hikes hardware price due to a memory crunch, and SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale is off to a rocky start. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
title_cn: 黑莓首席执行官表示安全软件可实现抗人工智能增长
summary: BlackBerry Ltd. Chief Executive Officer John Giamatteo had a direct answer when asked about one of the biggest challenges to software providers: Artificial intelligence isn’t ready to displace his safety-certified products.

title: Cost of the AI Boom: Anxiety, Longer Hours
title_cn: 人工智能繁荣的成本：焦虑、更长的工作时间
summary: One of the promises of AI was alleviating the burdens of work, but the workaholic culture in Silicon Valley hasn't disappeared. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas explains why round-the-clock managing of AI agents and intense competition are driving longer hours and heightened anxiety for tech workers. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Fall on Renewed Tech Woes; Zalando Declines
title_cn: 欧洲股市因新一轮科技困境而下跌；扎兰多衰落
summary: European shares fell from record levels amid shifting sentiment toward artificial intelligence and technology stocks.

title: How Geothermal Energy Could Power the AI Boom
title_cn: 地热能如何推动人工智能的繁荣
summary: Can geothermal energy solve the AI energy crunch? I-Pulse Co-Founder, Chairman and CEO Robert Friedland explains how a $250 million US investment will accelerate breakthrough semiconductor technology designed to drill deep into Earth's heat, delivering around-the-clock clean energy. He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to make a  case for government-backed industrial policy and why geothermal, and not wind or solar, is the future of America's energy infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Prices
title_cn: 随着苹果公司提高价格，人工智能成本现实检查冲击亚洲科技股
summary:
Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. raised prices for their products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.
Bloomberg Tech Host Ed Ludlow discusses the move from Apple to raise prices as well as what's next for OpenAI as they mull a delay for the company's IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
title_cn: Elroy Air 的货运无人机赌注
summary: Elroy Air is going public at a roughly $1 billion valuation, aiming to replace delivery trucks with long-range cargo drones. CEO Andrew Clare joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how the company’s heavy-payload aircraft works, why public markets are the right funding path and why defense demand and US supply-chain automation make this the ideal moment to scale. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley, Goldman Shares Fall on Possible OpenAI IPO Delay
title_cn: 摩根士丹利和高盛股价因 OpenAI IPO 可能延迟而下跌
summary: Shares of Morgan Stanley and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. fell on Friday after OpenAI is said to weigh holding off on an initial public offering until next year amid volatility in technology stocks.

title: BlackBerry CEO Giamatteo Sees QNX Powering Growth
title_cn: 黑莓首席执行官 Giamatteo 认为 QNX 推动增长
summary: BlackBerry CEO John Giamatteo discusses the company’s evolution into a software and infrastructure player, centered on its QNX operating system. He highlights that QNX now powers over 275 million vehicles globally and is increasingly used in robotics, medical devices and industrial automation. Giamatteo speaks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger and Alpine Saxon Woods Chief Market Strategist Sarah Hunt on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Touch MacBook to Use M5 Pro and Max Chips, With M7 Models to Follow
title_cn: Apple 的 Touch MacBook 将使用 M5 Pro 和 Max 芯片，M7 型号也将跟进
summary: Apple Inc.’s first-ever touch-screen laptop will rely on the company’s current high-end M5 chips, rather than next-generation silicon, though the company is working on a follow-up model with future M7 processors.

title: The Cult of the C-Suite Is Officially Over
title_cn: 对最高管理层的崇拜正式结束
summary:
A decade ago, it seemed like chief executives were broadly admired if not universally beloved. But these days, general sentiment over top executives has significantly shifted. And on top of that, CEOs increasingly complain they are overworked, overstressed and subjected to endless scrutiny.

Bloomberg Opinion's Beth Kowitt joins Brad Stone and Max Chafkin on the Everybody's Business podcast to unpack why many top talents are turning down CEO jobs and how the culture shift may impact everyday workers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Waver at End of Bruising Week for AI Trade
title_cn: 人工智能交易的挫败周结束时股市波动
summary:
Another burst of selling pummeled chipmakers, whipsawing stocks once again amid concerns over whether vast investments in artificial intelligence will justify the industry’s hefty valuations.
Virginie Maisonneuve, Founder at Maisonneuve Global Advisors, discusses the current AI narrative as investors continue to show jitters around high-flying tech stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Weighs IPO in 2027 After Expected Anthropic Public Debut
title_cn: Anthrop 首次公开亮相后，OpenAI 考虑在 2027 年进行 IPO
summary: OpenAI is considering an initial public offering as soon as in 2027, according to people familiar with the matter, a timeline that would potentially see it go public after its artificial intelligence rival Anthropic PBC.

title: World Bank, AfDB to Boost African Power Plan This Year
title_cn: 世界银行和非洲开发银行今年将推动非洲电力计划
summary: The World Bank and African Development Bank plan to accelerate their program to bring electricity to hundreds of millions of Africans this year by approving new projects, investing in Eritrea and promoting the development of regional power pools.

title: AI Is Already Reshaping US Politics at Every Level
title_cn: 人工智能已经在各个层面重塑美国政治
summary: From data center backlash to boundless cash from tech billionaires and concerns about deepfaked campaign ads, AI is everywhere in the 2026 US elections.

title: Market Underappreciates AI Capex Returns, Strategist Amoroso Says
title_cn: 策略师阿莫罗索表示，市场低估了人工智能资本支出回报
summary: Anastasia Amoroso, chief investment strategist at Partners Group, discusses the recent volatility in tech stocks with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OHB Shares Dip After Satellite Firm’s €789 Million Re-IPO
title_cn: 卫星公司 7.89 亿欧元重新首次公开募股后 OHB 股价下跌
summary: Executives from German satellite firm OHB SE and KKR & Co. rang the opening bell at the Frankfurt Stock Exchange on Friday after they raised €789 million in a share sale to increase investors’ access to the space company.

title: US Strikes Iran In Response to Strait of Hormuz Ship Attack
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗以回应霍尔木兹海峡船只袭击事件
summary: The US attacked Iran one day after Tehran struck a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz, an exchange that threatened to break the fragile ceasefire between the two countries.

title: “Soft Power Suicide”: Samantha Power On One Year Without USAID
title_cn: “软实力自杀”：萨曼莎在没有美国国际开发署的情况下继续执政一年
summary: Nearly a year after the Trump administration shuttered USAID, its former leader Samantha Power sits down with David Gura on the Big Take Podcast to discuss the impact of those cuts — and what she wishes she had done differently.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily Live From Uncharted Summit | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/26/2026
title_cn: 《彭博商业周刊》神秘海域峰会每日直播 |彭博商业周刊日报 6/26/2026
summary: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily is live from the Uncharted Summit in Southampton. Today, Alli McCartney, private wealth advisor and managing director of wealth management at UBS Alignment Partners, breaks down how wealthy clients are looking at the investment market.  Then, Jeff Perry, chief revenue officer at Carta, discusses investing in growing AI infrastructure. Plus, Adam Dell, founder and CEO at Domain Money, talks how his clients are viewing crypto investments as bitcoin remains down. Then, Allison Ellsworth, co-founder of alternative soda brand Poppi, discusses what consumers are looking for in the beverage market as customers look for alternatives to traditional alcohol and soda. Finally, Alan Hawley, chief revenue officer at Sentient Jet, talks the travel bump from the World Cup. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Appeals Court Rejects Trump EPA Bid to Roll Back Soot Pollution Limit
title_cn: 美国上诉法院驳回特朗普环保局降低烟尘污染限制的提议
summary: In a blow to the Trump administration’s deregulatory agenda, a federal appeals court on Friday rejected the Environmental Protection Agency’s attempt to roll back soot pollution standards set in 2024.

title: NATO Chief Upbeat But Trump’s Doubts Likely Won’t Go Away
title_cn: 北约主席乐观，但特朗普的疑虑可能不会消失
summary: Rutte said he’s positive about alliance future after talks with Trump, a longtime skeptic

title: Trump on Iran Ceasefire Violation: 'You'll Find Out'
title_cn: 特朗普谈伊朗违反停火协议：“你会发现的”
summary: US President Donald Trump accused Iran of violating their ceasefire agreement by firing at cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz during remarks with reports in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oman Tells Allies Ships Going Through Hormuz May Have to Pay
title_cn: 阿曼告诉盟国，经过霍尔木兹海峡的船只可能必须付出代价
summary: Oman has told European officials there’s no way of going back to the pre-war status quo with the Strait of Hormuz and transiting ships may have to be charged some fees, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Framework Deal Aiming to End Conflict
title_cn: 以色列和黎巴嫩达成旨在结束冲突的框架协议
summary: Israel, Lebanon and the US reached an initial trilateral framework agreement aimed at paving the way for ending the conflict between the two countries and ultimately reaching a peace settlement, a senior Israeli official said Friday.

title: Trump Says Iran Violated Ceasefire | Balance of Power 6/26/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗违反停火协议权力平衡 6/26/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Democratic Congresswoman Madeleine Dean of Pennsylvania, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Constitutional lawyer Robert McWhirter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samantha Power on USAID and Trump’s ‘Soft Power Suicide’
title_cn: 萨曼莎·鲍尔谈美国国际开发署和特朗普的“软实力自杀”
summary: Nearly a year after the Trump administration shuttered USAID, its former administrator, Samantha Power, sits down with David Gura and the Big Take podcast to discuss the impact of those cuts — and what she wishes she had done differently. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Iran Violated Ceasefire With Hormuz Drone Attack
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗霍尔木兹无人机袭击违反停火协议
summary: US President Donald Trump accused Iran of violating their ceasefire agreement by firing at cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz, underscoring how unsettled the situation remains in a waterway critical to global energy flows.

title: Trump’s USAID Cuts Hobbled Ebola Response, Ex-Agency Head Says
title_cn: 前机构负责人表示，特朗普的美国国际开发署削减了陷入困境的埃博拉应对措施
summary: The Trump administration’s move to close the US Agency for International Development helped enable the Ebola outbreak spreading through the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda, according to Samantha Power, who led the organization for almost four years.

title: Milei Aide Reportedly Bought Video Game Console on Staffers’ Credit Cards
title_cn: 据报道，Milei Aide 用员工信用卡购买了视频游戏机
summary: Argentine President Javier Milei’s embattled cabinet chief used staffers’ credit cards to purchase video game equipment that cost far more than his government salary, newspaper La Nacion reported Friday.

title: Venezuela Quake Crisis Tests Legitimacy of Rodriguez Regime
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震危机考验罗德里格斯政权的合法性
summary: The earthquakes that struck Venezuela Wednesday have become the first major political test for acting President Delcy Rodríguez, with the disaster quickly evolving into a contest over competence.

title: FDA Chief Shortlist Includes Cancer Care CEO, Pentagon Official
title_cn: FDA 首席入围名单包括癌症护理首席执行官、五角大楼官员
summary: Jeff Vacirca, a physician and leader of a prominent New York oncology group, and Pentagon health official Stephen Ferrara are among the final candidates the Trump administration is considering to lead the Food and Drug Administration, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Leon Black Subpoenaed by House Panel Over Epstein Ties
title_cn: 莱昂·布莱克因爱泼斯坦关系被众议院小组传唤
summary: Billionaire investor Leon Black was issued two subpoenas by a congressional committee and walked out early from voluntary testimony regarding his relationship to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

title: Romania’s Crisis Deepens as Parties Clash Over Premier Bids
title_cn: 各方就总理竞标发生冲突，罗马尼亚危机加剧
summary: Romania’s political establishment failed to break its deadlock as the four parties from the recently broken coalition offered competing candidates for the prime minister’s post.

title: Lutnick Delayed Canada Bridge Debut to Seek Bigger Cut of Toll Revenue
title_cn: 卢特尼克推迟了加拿大大桥的开通，以寻求更大的通行费收入削减
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick intervened to delay the opening of a new bridge between the US and Canada and is pressing to renegotiate the deal for a larger share of toll revenue, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Colombia’s ‘Tiger Trade’ Fades as Fiscal Risks Loom
title_cn: 财政风险迫在眉睫，哥伦比亚的“老虎贸易”逐渐消失
summary: The rally that accompanied Abelardo de la Espriella’s rise to power in Colombia is already fading, with investors waiting on cabinet announcements and a concrete plan to repair the nation’s strained public finances before adding to what had been some of the best trades in emerging markets.

title: South African Firms Pledge Drones Ahead of Anti-Migrant Protests
title_cn: 南非公司承诺在反移民抗议之前使用无人机
summary: South African businesses will support the police with drones and helicopters next week when anti-immigrant groups’ deadline for undocumented migrants to leave the country expires.

title: Newsom Pitches Federal Wealth Tax After Losing California Battle
title_cn: 纽瑟姆在输掉加州之战后提出联邦财富税
summary: Governor Gavin Newsom is calling for a federal tax on billionaires after failing to stop a California wealth tax from reaching the November ballot, setting up a high-profile test of whether voters will back one of the nation’s most aggressive efforts to tax the rich.

title: California to Vote on Raising Bar for Cities to Increase Taxes
title_cn: 加州将投票决定提高城市增税门槛
summary: California voters will decide in November whether to approve a measure that would make it significantly harder to hike local taxes through the ballot box.

title: John Bolton Pleads Guilty to Mishandling Classified Material
title_cn: 约翰·博尔顿承认不当处理机密材料
summary: John Bolton, a former national security adviser to President Donald Trump who became one of his fiercest critics, appeared in court on Friday to plead guilty to unlawfully retaining national defense information.

title: Vance Says Nixon’s Watergate Wouldn’t End a Presidency Now
title_cn: 万斯表示尼克松的水门事件不会立即结束总统任期
summary: Vice President JD Vance called it “crazy” that the Watergate scandal toppled Richard Nixon’s presidency, saying it would have barely registered in today’s political environment.

title: Germany Weighs €20 Billion Tax Cut as Merz Seizes Momentum
title_cn: Merz 乘势而上，德国考虑减税 200 亿欧元
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition is negotiating as much as €20 billion ($22.8 billion) in income-tax relief as it taps momentum for its broader reform agenda, though the parties remain divided on how to pay for the cuts.

title: UAE Residents Told to Ignore Missile Warning Minutes After Alert
title_cn: 阿联酋居民被告知在警报几分钟后忽略导弹警告
summary: Residents across the United Arab Emirates received emergency alerts on their phones on Friday warning of a potential missile threat, minutes before authorities issued an all-clear and instructed people to disregard the original message.

title: Johannesburg Struggles to Keep Lights on But Repays Bondholders
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡努力维持运转但偿还债券持有人
summary: The City of Johannesburg, which is on the verge of financial collapse, put investors at the front of its queue of creditors this week when it repaid a 1.44 billion rand ($88 million) bond.
